channel.title: Beckman Coulter Life Sciences — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Beckman Coulter Life Sciences (becls).

item.title: CVE-2025-0941 · 5.8 MEDIUM — MET ONE 3400+ Potential Credential Exposure
item.description: MET ONE 3400+ instruments running software v1.0.41 can, under rare conditions, temporarily store credentials in plain text within the system. This data is not available to unauthenticated users.
